title: Poloniex - REKT
relevance_summary: Large-scale wallet drain using off-chain attack vectors targeting exchange employees or devices

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds from a known compromised wallet address

red_flags: large sums transferred across multiple chains
summary: Poloniex experienced a large-scale wallet drain where attackers accessed hot wallets through off-chain means, resulting in a loss of $126M across multiple chains. A guard could have blocked transactions from known compromised wallet addresses to prevent such losses.
